description: upmsp.edu.in is the website of the Uttar Pradesh Madhyamik Shiksha Parishad (UPMSP), the Uttar Pradesh secondary education board. It provides information, results, registrations, and access to school and administrative education portals.
summary: No public developer integration surface was found for upmsp.edu.in; the site appears to be a public education portal with web login pages and linked administrative/student portals, but no documented API, GraphQL endpoint, MCP server, or CLI for developers.
